criteria.title: Test integrity and regression signal

findings.summary: A1 metric-derived score is 2.3/4.0, in the warning band — no single finding drove this; it reflects the combined metric weighting below.

metrics.name: test_to_source_ratio
metrics.label: Test-to-source file ratio
metrics.description: Measures how much concrete test surface exists relative to implementation surface.

metrics.name: coverage_percent
metrics.label: Static coverage percentage
metrics.description: Uses a static coverage report value or configured threshold when present, without running tests.

metrics.name: verification_script_ratio
metrics.label: Verification script ratio
metrics.description: Measures explicit test/lint/typecheck verification commands (via npm script or CI-invoked tool) plus test runner configuration.

metrics.name: non_hollow_test_share
metrics.label: Non-hollow test share
metrics.description: Penalizes skipped or placeholder-only test files; test-directory support scaffolding (helpers/fixtures with no test in them) is excluded from the denominator.

criteria.notes: A1 is detected from real test files, test runner configuration, and optional coverage configuration.

criteria.title: Data-layer isolation and secrets posture

findings.summary: A non-template .env file was tracked in git history; no secret-shaped value was detected.

evidence.label: .env file (not a template) tracked in git history; no confirmed secret value found

metrics.name: secret_cleanliness
metrics.label: Secret cleanliness
metrics.description: Credits absence of committed or recent-history secret findings in the static scan.

metrics.name: env_handling_depth
metrics.label: Environment handling depth
metrics.description: Counts three bounded env-handling practices (0–3): template file, gitignore rule, env reads in any supported language.

criteria.notes: History secret scanning covers all reachable git history for credential-pattern paths unless the explicit credential-blob safety valve is reported.

criteria.title: Production readiness
criteria.notes: No deployable-service surface detected — production-readiness not applicable to this library/CLI archetype. Signals checked: production server entrypoint (HTTP/RPC port binding in main/server/app files, outside examples/tests/demo dirs), deploy config (vercel.json, render.yaml, fly.toml, Procfile, app.yaml, serverless.yml, docker-compose, k8s/helm manifests), CI deploy job (fly deploy, kubectl apply, helm install/upgrade, docker push). Dockerfile alone is ambiguous and does not qualify.

criteria.title: Dependency hygiene

metrics.name: declared_version_range_ratio
metrics.label: Declared version range ratio
metrics.description: Measures dependencies declared with an explicit version constraint (range or exact); a library correctly ships ranges, so ranges earn full credit here.

metrics.name: lockfile_coverage
metrics.label: Lockfile coverage
metrics.description: Credited when present (reproducible dev/CI installs); a library without a committed lockfile is not penalized — consumers resolve their own trees.

metrics.name: dependency_automation_ratio
metrics.label: Dependency automation ratio
metrics.description: Credits automated dependency updates and package-manager audit hooks.

metrics.name: dependency_count_sanity
metrics.label: Dependency count sanity
metrics.description: Credits a sane direct-dependency count for a library (full credit up to 120 declared specs across manifests, declining beyond).

criteria.notes: A4 scored against library/CLI norms (no deploy surface detected — same archetype line as A3): declared version ranges are correct library behavior; a committed lockfile is credited but not required.

findings.summary: Claim source and implementation files are present, but no dedicated claim-reality report artifact was supplied.

metrics.name: claim_match_rate
metrics.label: Claim match rate
metrics.description: Uses bounded implementation-to-claim-source depth as a static proxy when no dedicated artifact exists.

metrics.name: claim_source_depth
metrics.label: Claim source depth
metrics.description: Credits multiple claim-bearing documents without judging unverified prose as truth.

metrics.name: reconciliation_artifact_depth
metrics.label: Reconciliation artifact depth
metrics.description: Requires a specific claim-reality artifact to reach full depth.

criteria.title: Alfred-internal process dimension
criteria.notes: Substrate-specific: an Alfred-internal process dimension is not applicable to external code.

metrics.name: pr_trace_primitives
metrics.label: PR trace primitive coverage
metrics.description: Measures CI, PR template, and review-gate evidence for pull-request traceability.

metrics.name: pr_merge_ratio
metrics.label: Recent PR merge ratio
metrics.description: Uses bounded git history as a deterministic proxy for PR outcome traceability.

findings.summary: B3 metric-derived score is 2.1/4.0, in the warning band — no single finding drove this; it reflects the combined metric weighting below.

metrics.name: ci_script_depth
metrics.label: CI verification depth
metrics.description: Counts npm verification scripts plus distinct test/lint/typecheck/build command categories detected anywhere in CI workflows; language-agnostic, counted by category not by file.

metrics.name: default_branch_ci_depth
metrics.label: PR-gate CI workflow count
metrics.description: Counts CI workflows that target pull requests or the default branch, up to 4.

metrics.name: audit_artifact_depth
metrics.label: Audit artifact depth
metrics.description: Measures quantity of audit, security, runbook, incident, status, and changelog artifacts.

metrics.name: audit_freshness_depth
metrics.label: Audit freshness depth
metrics.description: Credits audit artifacts that carry freshness/current-state markers.

criteria.title: Alfred-internal process dimension
criteria.notes: Substrate-specific: an Alfred-internal process dimension is not applicable to external code.

criteria.title: Privileged-operation human gating
criteria.notes: No privileged-operation surface (prod DB admin GRANT/privilege DDL, role escalation, or documented human-gate governance) detected in this repo.
